column3: serve.py uses every graph_core primitive: _db ops, _cow envelope, _git for HEAD/root, _schema for validation
stats.py uses _db.get_stats and _git helpers; main.py lazy-imports into graph_core subsystems indirectly
ui.py uses find_theo_root to locate config.json; talks to KuzuDB directly (bypasses _db.py) because it needs a long-lived connection per-request
_db.py imports all schema constants (tables, PKs, DDL, column orders) and drives KuzuDB operations from them
use.py reads skill markdown via importlib.resources and writes it into .claude/ and .agents/
use.py calls _db.init_schema to bootstrap the DB and uses _schema.CSV_FILES to seed empty CSVs
